/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Pet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Shop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/PetFSM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Genetics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/Minigame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_pet.dir/src/GameManager.cpp.o -o virtual_pet
